<!--
  Custom-code child fragment inserted into regionReport::DESeq2Report()'s
  auto-generated report via the `customCode` argument (see the DGE block in
  main.R). This used to be built line-by-line in R with writeLines()/paste0();
  it is now a plain template with {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens substituted at
  runtime, which is both easier to read and easier to keep in sync with the
  rest of the report styling.

  Placeholders (all relative to `report_dir`, already repointed at a .png if
  pdftools successfully converted the source .pdf -- see main.R):
    {{PCA_FILE}}       - PCA plot (original)
    {{PCA_CORR_FILE}}  - PCA plot (batch-corrected via limma), optional
    {{HEATMAP_FILE}}   - Sample correlation heatmap
    {{VOLCANO_FILE}}   - Volcano plot
    {{MA_FILE}}        - MA plot (shrunken)
-->

```{r pca_orig, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='PCA plot (Original)', eval=file.exists('{{PCA_FILE}}')}
  knitr::include_graphics('{{PCA_FILE}}')
```

```{r pca_corr, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='PCA plot (Batch Corrected via limma)', eval=file.exists('{{PCA_CORR_FILE}}')}
  if (file.exists('{{PCA_CORR_FILE}}')) knitr::include_graphics('{{PCA_CORR_FILE}}')
```

```{r heatmap, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='Sample Correlation Heatmap', eval=file.exists('{{HEATMAP_FILE}}')}
  knitr::include_graphics('{{HEATMAP_FILE}}')
```

```{r volcano, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='Volcano plot', eval=file.exists('{{VOLCANO_FILE}}')}
  knitr::include_graphics('{{VOLCANO_FILE}}')
```

```{r maplot, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='MA plot (shrunken)', eval=file.exists('{{MA_FILE}}')}
  knitr::include_graphics('{{MA_FILE}}')
```
